text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And that's a win for Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, for someone who's always messing around,
your racing skills are no joke.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Especially that last stretch around the corner. I
was impressed, to say the least.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that? My trainer made me swear off that
technique.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But when someone bans me from doing
something, it just makes me wanna do it even
more! How do you like that!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, though, it's always "don't do this" or
"don't do that." Hearing it every training session
is getting old.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Every training session? Just how many forbidden techniques do you have?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: At least 700 if you count the minor ones!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: And how many of those have you actually tried?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All of them, obviously! Like I said, being told not to do something makes me wanna do it more!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
(So her trainer is feeding her all the regular
techniques, and she's coming up with unexpected
ways to counter them all...)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Well, well... That trainer of yours is more
interesting than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No duh! I wouldn't choose just anyone to be my
trainer! And things will only get even more
interesting from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And like so, Gold Ship grows even stronger
without realizing it.
